title: ITALY enforcement action against Ministero della Cultura (12,000)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 12,000 on the Ministero della Cultura. The controller, who is operating the Archaeological Museum of Campobasso, used video surveillance in the museum, with the purpose of protecting the museums assets. But the controller also used the footage...
